CTN 4, 021 [Enuma Anu Enlil varia][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] ⸢MIN TE⸣ [...]

[...] approaches ditto [...].

o 2'2'

[...] ⸢MUNUS⸣ PEŠ₄-MEŠ [...]

[...] pregnant women [...]

o 3'3'

[...] DINGIR.MAḪ it-te₉-mi-du ina KUR DU₃.A.BI ŠEŠ ⸢ŠEŠ⸣ [...]

[...] Belet-ili touch (each other): in the land, all of it, brother [...] brother.

o 4'4'

[...] EN ša₃ ŠA₃-ši-na [...]

[...] together with their foetuses [...].

o 5'5'

[...] ana mul₄1(IKU)gana₂ TE bi-ib!(DI-)lu₄

[...] approaches the Field: high water.

o 6'6'

[...] KI.MIN ana mul₄⸢ERIDU⸣ki TE ra-pa-du I₃.[GAL₂]

[...] alternatively, approaches the Eridu star: there will be rapādu-disease.

o 7'7'

[...] KI.MIN ana mul₄EN.TE.NA.⸢MAŠ.ḪUM⸣ TE mi-⸢šir⸣-tu₄ ḫa-ru-⸢up-tu₄⸣ [...]

[...] alternatively, approaches Entenamašhum: the early catch [...].

o 8'8'

[...] ⸢GANA₂⸣.ZI NIMtu₄ SI.⸢SA₂⸣

[...]: the early kanašû-flower will thrive.

o 9'9'

[...] ⸢ana MUL₄⸣.MUL₄ TEḫe dIŠKUR ŠE!(MAN) ⸢RA⸣

[...] approaches the Bristle: Adad will devastate the barley.

o 10'10'

[... KI].⸢MIN ana mul₄is le⸣-e DIM₄ : TE SIG₅ KUR ZAḪ₂ ⸢KI.MIN⸣ d⸢IŠKUR⸣ [...]

[...] alternatively, comes close to (or): approaches the Bull's Jaw: the best of the land will be destroyed; alternatively, Adad [...].

o 11'11'

[...] ⸢mul₄⸣MUŠ TE BAD₅.BAD₅ ina KUR GAR⸢an⸣ UŠ₂-[MEŠ ...]

[...] approaches the Snake: defeat will occur in the land. Deaths [...].

o 12'12'

[... mul₄ŠU].⸢GI?⸣ TE BURU₁₄ kurURIki SUD? x GAR x [...]

[...] approaches the Old Man: the harvest of the land of Akkad ... [...].

o 13'13'

[...] x TE x [...]

[...] ... approaches ... [...].
